subject: feat(pwa): add installable PWA with offline support and update prompts
body:
Portfolio site is now a Progressive Web App. Service worker precaches all
assets for offline viewing (useful for demos/interviews with spotty wifi).
Users control when updates apply via a non-intrusive banner.

- vite-plugin-pwa with registerType: 'prompt'
- Vanilla JS pwa.js: SW registration, update banner, offline toast,
  install prompt with browser-specific manual instructions
- beforeinstallprompt early capture in both HTML files
- "Install app" burger menu item (hidden when installed/dismissed)
- 1024x1024 maskable icon generated via Sharp at 400 DPI
- apple-touch-icon for iOS home screen

Tags: pwa, install, offline, service-worker, feature
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pwa
Semver: minor
